bead.title: FEAT-008 P1: shared primitives (ConfirmDialog, TypedConfirmDialog, Tooltip)
bead.description: Extract shared UI primitives used by 5+ callers: (a) <ConfirmDialog> — action label, destructive flag, summary slot, focus return on close, Escape cancel, aria-label = action label; (b) <TypedConfirmDialog extends ConfirmDialog> — gates confirm until user types expectedText (bead id / plugin name); (c) <Tooltip> — bits-ui wrapper. CRITICAL: for disabled-button tooltip, wrap the button in a <span> that owns the hover handler (disabled buttons don't fire mouse events). Keep native <select> for tier/role/project/model fields (Playwright .selectOption only works on native select). Use bits-ui Command for palette (Phase 4).
bead.acceptance: Primitives exist in src/lib/components/; unit-test smoke passes; no consumer wired yet.
